channel.title: Clam Bake Santa
channel.description: Daily haikus celebrating holidays and birthdays.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-24
item.description:
National Tequila Day
Lime and salt embrace
Golden sun in crystal glass
Cheers ring through the air.

Amelia Earhart Day
Wings stretch wide and bold
Blue skies call with sweet promise
Adventure takes flight.

Happy Birthday Alexandre Dumas
Pages turn like leaves
Ink flows with dreams and laughter
Stars shine in his words.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-23
item.description:
National Vanilla Ice Cream Day
Scoop of creamy bliss
Drifting on a warm sweet breeze
Joy melts in each bite.

National Hot Dog Day
Grilled franks on the grill
Mustard and relish swirl bright
Summer's joy unfolds.

Happy Birthday Raymond Chandler
Pages bloom with dreams
Ink spills stories like bright stars
Cake smiles on the plate.

Welcome to Leo Season
Warm sunbeams will shine
Fields of gold embrace the day
Joy and laughter bloom.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-22
item.description:
National Mango Day
Juicy mango bliss
Sunset orange, sweet delight
Joy drips with each bite.

Rat Catcher's Day
Children chase and laugh
Colorful tails swiftly twine
Joy spills through the air.

Happy Birthday Gregor Mendel
Seeds of joy abound
Patterns bloom in rich colors
Life's tales intertwine.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-21
item.description:
National Junk Food Day
Crunchy chips delight
Chocolate rivers flowing sweet
Let the smiles spill wide.

National Crème Brulee Day
Creamy dreams await
Caramel hugs the surface
Warm spoons dive with joy.

Happy Birthday Ernest Hemingway
Lemon cake delights
Bright stories weave through each page
Cheers echo with joy.

First Quarter Moon
Silver sliver beams
Whispers of the night spark joy
Stars wink in delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-20
item.description:
National Lollipop Day
Sugar swirls in sun
Colors twirl with joyful taste
Lollipops bring smiles.

Moon Day
Silver moon above
Whispers of the night breeze sing
Stars twinkle like dreams.

Happy Birthday Cormac McCarthy
Joyful tales unwind
Crisp pages turn like soft winds
Laughter warms the room.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-19
item.description:
National Raspberry Cake Day
Ripe berries glisten
Fluffy sweetness fills the air
Joy wrapped in each slice.

Stick Out Your Tongue Day
Pink tongues taste the breeze
Laughter echoes through the park
Joyful faces beam.

Happy Birthday Edgar Degas
Pastels swirl and twirl
Ballet dreams take to the stage
Laughter fills the room.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-18
item.description:
National Sour Candy Day
Sour tang on lips
Lemon drops and sweet tartness
Joyful pucker smiles.

World Listening Day
Whispers of the breeze
Crickets chirp in soft chorus
Nature's song surrounds.

Happy Birthday Nelson Mandela
Sunrise on the hill
Joyful voices share sweet cake
Hearts unite with love.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-17
item.description:
National Peach Ice Cream Day
Peach swirls in a cone
Sweet cream drips on summer's breeze
Sunshine melts with joy.

World Emoji Day
Tiny hearts will dance
Colors burst in joyful cheer
Smiles and sparks unite.

Happy Birthday James Cagney
Candles dance and sway
Bright laughter fills the warm room
Cheers for James today!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-16
item.description:
National Fresh Spinach Day
Green leaves dance with cheer
Flavorful crunch on plates bright
Nature's gift to us.

National Corn Fritters Day
Golden corn sizzles
Crispy edges, warm delight
Flavor pops and sings.

Happy Birthday Ginger Rogers
Dancing lights shimmer
Colors swirl in cheerful glee
Cake and smiles abound.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-15
item.description:
National Gummy Worm Day
Wiggly wonders
Colors twirl like rainbows bright
Chewy smiles abound.

National Give Something Away Day
Baskets overflow
Warm smiles shared like soft blankets
Hearts bloom in the light.

Happy Birthday Rembrandt van Rijn
Golden light cascades
Canvas whispers vibrant hues
Artistry takes flight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-14
item.description:
National Macaroni and Cheese Day
Golden cheese will shine
Butter swirls through warm pasta
A hug on your plate.

Happy Birthday Woody Guthrie
Bright strings strum the air
Songs of dust and open roads
Hearts lift with each note.

New Moon
Gentle night unfolds
Stars peek through velvet curtains
Dreams bloom in the dark.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-13
item.description:
National French Fries Day
Crispy bites delight
Dipping sauces swirl and twirl
Laughter fills the air.

Embrace Your Geekness Day
Bright screens softly glow
Laughter fills the cozy room
Dreams take flight and soar.

Happy Birthday Wole Soyinka
Bright candles flicker
Laughter swirls like warm breezes
Stories bloom like spring.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-12
item.description:
Pecan Pie Day
Nuts and spices blend
Warm aromas fill the air
Slice of joy served right.

Happy Birthday Henry David Thoreau
Leaves flutter gently
As sunlight warms the soft earth
Nature’s gift abounds.

Happy Birthday Pablo Neruda
Bright blooms paint the sky
Laughter wraps like a warm hug
Joy’s feast fills the air.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-11
item.description:
National Blueberry Muffin Day
Blue berries glisten
Soft muffins fresh from the pan
Warm smiles fill the air.

Cheer Up the Lonely Day
Joyful laughter rings
Warm hugs wrap like soft blankets
Hopeful hearts unite.

Happy Birthday John Quincy Adams
Laughter fills the air
Bright balloons in joyful arcs
Cheers for you today!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-10
item.description:
National Pina Colada Day
Coconut whispers
Tropical sun warms the sand
Cheers rise with sweet sips.

International Kitten Day
Soft paws on warm laps
Purring whispers fill the air
Joyful leaps abound.

Happy Birthday Camille Pissarro
Brush strokes paint the dawn
Warm hues of joy and laughter
Nature's art unveiled.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-09
item.description:
National Sugar Cookie Day
Sweet dough rolls and hugs
Frosting swirls in colors bright
Joyful bites of bliss.

National No Bra Day
Sunshine on bare skin
Gentle breeze through the warm air
Freedom feels like joy.

Happy Birthday Nikola Tesla
Electric sparks fly
Whispers of a bright future
Genius lights the way.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-08
item.description:
National Milk Chocolate with Almonds Day
Rich chocolate melts slow
Crunchy almonds entwined sweet
Joyful bites await.

Video Games Day
Joyful pixels dance
Joyful worlds beyond the screen
Adventure awaits.

Happy Birthday Percy Bysshe Shelley
Joyful waves of light
Whispers of the soft, cool breeze
Words dance in the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-07
item.description:
World Chocolate Day
Sweet cocoa whispers
Velvet rivers of delight
Joy wrapped in each bite.

National Macaroni Day
Cheesy rivers flow
Twirl of pasta on forks bright
Warm hugs on the plate.

Happy Birthday Marc Chagall
Colors dance on walls
Joyful whispers fill the space
Art sings through the years.

Last Quarter Moon
Soft silver whispers
Moonlight dances on still lakes
Night wraps dreams in peace.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-06
item.description:
National Fried Chicken Day
Golden crusts shimmer
Savory scents fill the air
Together we feast.

National Kissing Day
Sweet lips meet with warmth
Petals dance in the soft breeze
Hearts bloom with each kiss.

Happy Birthday Frida Kahlo
Vivid blooms surround
Brush strokes dance in the moonlight
Life's canvas alive.

Happy Birthday Sylvester Stallone
Cakes stacked high with cream
Laughter springs like fresh spring blooms
Cheers dance in the air.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-05
item.description:
National Apple Turnover Day
Golden crusty treats
Warm apples dance with spices
Sweet joy on each bite.

Workaholics Day
Books stacked high like hills
Warm coffee brews, dreams take flight
Rest on this sweet day.

Happy Birthday P.T. Barnum
Candles dance and glow
Joyful songs and bright stories
Magic fills the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-04
item.description:
Independence Day
Skyward, colors bloom
Children’s laughter fills the park
Fireworks light the night.

National Barbecued Spareribs Day
Smoky scents arise
Tender ribs, glaze shining bright
Gather 'round the grill.

Happy Birthday Nathaniel Hawthorne
Golden leaves flutter
A tale spun with warm delight
Words like autumn's glow.

Happy Birthday Stephen Foster
Candles glow like stars
Melodies in warm embrace
Joy wrapped in sweet song.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-03
item.description:
National Eat Beans Day
Beans simmer and pop
Spices whirl in warm embrace
Taste buds dance with glee.

Compliment Your Mirror Day
Glimmering to you
Reflections glow with warm light
Embrace all your grace.

Happy Birthday Franz Kafka
Books bloom like flowers
Pages rustle, tales unfold
Ink spills magic dreams.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-02
item.description:
World UFO Day
Stars twinkle above
Colors swirl in night’s embrace
Dreams from afar gleam.

National Anisette Day
Anise dreams delight
Warm sips of spice embrace you
Cheerful hearts unite.

Happy Birthday Hermann Hesse
Candles softly glow
Whispers of joy and dreams bloom
A toast to the stars.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-07-01
item.description:
National Creative Ice Cream Flavors Day
Scoops of colors bright
Lemon zests and berry sweet
Dreams melt in each bite.

International Joke Day
Laughter fills the air
Tickles dance like summer breeze
Smiles bloom bright and wide.

Happy Birthday George Sand
Golden sunbeams shine
Laughter fills the soft sweet air
Cake and dreams align.

Happy Birthday Olivia de Havilland
Golden film lights glow
Stars twinkle in velvet night
Sweet dreams take their flight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-30
item.description:
National Meteor Watch Day
Stars burst in the night
Wishing trails of bright wonder
Whispers of the sky.

World Social Media Day
Bright screens glow with cheer
Voices mingle like soft song
Connections so dear.

Happy Birthday Lena Horne
Voices weave like silk
Laughter sparkles in warm air
Dreams take flight tonight.

Happy Birthday Mike Tyson
Bright balloons take wing
Laughter fills the sunlit room
Cake and dreams unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-29
item.description:
National Almond Buttercrunch Day
Crunchy joy unfolds
Sweet and nutty bliss awaits
Taste that warms the heart.

Camera Day
Lenses capture smiles
Colors burst like blooms in spring
Moments hold their breath.

Happy Birthday Antoine de Saint-Exupery
Soft winds whisper dreams
Fanciful tales take to flight
Stars join in the cheer.

Full Moon
Silver light above
Whispers of night softly hum
Dreams float like soft clouds.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-28
item.description:
National Tapioca Day
Pearls of joy delight
Sweetness dances on the tongue
Laughter fills the air.

Paul Bunyan Day
Tall pines sway with cheer
Lumberjacks laugh, axes flash
Blue rivers flow bright.

Happy Birthday Jean-Jacques Rousseau
Sweet cake fills the air
Laughter dances like spring blooms
Joy wraps all around.

Happy Birthday Mel Brooks
Laughter fills the air
Cake and joy dance on each plate
Cheers for Mel's bright spark!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-27
item.description:
National Orange Blossom Day
Petals dance in breeze
Fragrant blooms paint the earth bright
Joyful hearts unite.

Sunglasses Day
Bright skies all around
Laughter dances on the breeze
Shadows play with light.

Happy Birthday Helen Keller
Joyful voices sing
Colors dance in bright delight
Hearts unite in cheer.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-26
item.description:
National Chocolate Pudding Day
Chocolate waves flow wide
Velvet dreams on silver spoons
Sweet joy fills each bite.

National Coconut Day
Coconuts abound
Beneath palms, sweet breezes sigh
Nature's gift, pure joy.

Happy Birthday Pearl S. Buck
Joyful words take flight
Stories weave like vibrant threads
Hearts dance in delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-25
item.description:
National Catfish Day
Bubbles rise and dance
Fried catfish scents fill the air
Joyful hearts unite.

Log Cabin Day
Woodsmoke fills the air
Rustling leaves in crisp cool breeze
Cozy hearts unite.

Happy Birthday George Orwell
Joyful cheers resound
Cake and dreams in the sweet air
Pages turn with hope.
